prompt:
A hand-painted children's picture-book illustration. Warm, stylized, painterly
CARTOON art with clean simplified shapes, smooth soft-edged forms, and gentle confident linework.
Rich but soft color: luminous gradients, warm light, soft ambient shadow, and a faint paper /
gouache grain like a premium printed picture book. Romantic, reverent, a little dreamlike, glowing.
Cinematic but gentle lighting (golden hour, candle glow, starlight, dawn). Depth via soft
atmospheric haze, never harsh detail.

STRICTLY NOT photorealistic. No photographic realism, no 3D render, no CGI, no lifelike skin pores,
no realistic camera photography, no hyper-detailed textures, no plastic sheen. People are simplified
and illustrated, never lifelike. Composition is designed for a tall 9:16 phone page.

Color & palette: warm wheat-gold and soft green — sunlit fields, shared bread, and open hands. House accents: warm sand, terracotta, dusty rose, honey gold, sage and teal accents by day; deep indigo, violet, and silver starlight by night.

Subjects in this scene (render each EXACTLY as described and as shown in its reference image):
- a golden wheat field under a wide sky: a vast golden wheat field rippling in warm light under a wide soft sky, heavy grain-heavy stalks, abundant and alive.

Scene and composition: Title cover: open hands gently offering a small loaf of bread in warm golden light, a soft wheat field behind. Render the title "The Joy of Giving" in an elegant cream serif in the upper third.

Reference images: Image 1 is the master ART-STYLE reference — match its medium, linework, color, grain, lighting and finish exactly. Image 2 shows a golden wheat field under a wide sky — keep this subject's design, clothing, colors and silhouette identical to it. Compose a NEW scene with a fresh camera angle and poses as described above; do NOT copy the layout or poses of the reference images.

Rich but soft color: luminous gradients, warm light, soft ambient shadow, and a faint paper /
gouache grain like a premium printed picture book. Romantic, reverent, a little dreamlike, glowing.
Cinematic but gentle lighting (golden hour, candle glow, starlight, dawn). Depth via soft
atmospheric haze, never harsh detail.

STRICTLY NOT photorealistic. No photographic realism, no 3D render, no CGI, no lifelike skin pores,
no realistic camera photography, no hyper-detailed textures, no plastic sheen. People are simplified
and illustrated, never lifelike. Composition is designed for a tall 9:16 phone page.

Color & palette: warm wheat-gold and soft green — sunlit fields, shared bread, and open hands. House accents: warm sand, terracotta, dusty rose, honey gold, sage and teal accents by day; deep indigo, violet, and silver starlight by night.

Subjects in this scene (render each EXACTLY as described and as shown in its reference image):
- a golden wheat field under a wide sky: a vast golden wheat field rippling in warm light under a wide soft sky, heavy grain-heavy stalks, abundant and alive.

Scene and composition: A wide golden wheat field at sunset, the grain ready for harvest, abundant; dark lower zone.

Reserve the BOTTOM portion of the image as calm, uncluttered negative space that is softly darkened, so overlaid text reads clearly there.

IMPORTANT: this image must contain absolutely NO text of any kind — no letters, words, numbers, calligraphy, signage, labels, captions, or writing anywhere. A completely wordless illustration.

Reference images: Image 1 is the master ART-STYLE reference — match its medium, linework, color, grain, lighting and finish exactly. Image 2 shows a golden wheat field under a wide sky — keep this subject's design, clothing, colors and silhouette identical to it. Compose a NEW scene with a fresh camera angle and poses as described above; do NOT copy the layout or poses of the reference images.
